MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEXRICO, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-02-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO AUG-20-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

#3 CHAITIN--REPTR JOHN BRYARS PLTF ATTY SAUL FERSTER, DEF ATTY KSENIA TSENIN 1040AM CC FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. STIPULATED SETTLEMENT REACHED--STIP JUDGMT FORR PLTF VS DEF FOR POSSESSION OF 227 CLINTON PARK, APT 3, SF, CA. WRIT OF POSS MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT THERE IS STAY OF PHYSICAL EVICTION UNTIL SEP 14, 1993. STIP JUGMT FOR PLTF AND VS DEF ALSO FOR $4000 RENTS, DAMAGES AND ATTY FEES. PLTF TO KEEP LAST MONTHS' RENT AND TO DISPOSE OF SEC DEP PER CIVIL CODE. IF DEF MOVES OUT ON TIME, BY 1159PM ON SEP 13, 1993, THEN PLTF WILL VAC JUDGMENT AND DISM WITH PREJ AND NO FURTHER MONIES WILL BE DUE FROM DEF ARISING OUT OF THIS TENANCY PRO VIDED NO DAMAGES ARE DONE TO PREMISES BETWEEN NOW AND SEP 14 1993. ALL AGREE IF JUDGMENT REMAINS IN PLACE IN THIS CASE THERE WILL BE NO S/E'S, WRITS OR APPEALS TAKEN. PLTF ATTY IS TO PREPARE NECESSARY PAPERS.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROTHE, RICK H. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 227 CLINTON PARK, APT. 3, S.F. $4,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-13-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, $4,000.00 INCLUDES ATTY FEES. PLTF MAY RETAIN DEFT'S LAST MONTH'S RENT OF $600.00;SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $250.00 DISPOSED OF ACCORDING TO CIVIL CODE. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
